// 01 — About Me

About Me

Hi, I'm Arman Jahed, a contemporary music student at the University of Canberra.

I am passionate about creativity and enjoy developing original musical ideas. My work focuses on guitar performance, songwriting, and music production using Ableton Live, where I explore different sounds and emotional expressions through music.

Alongside my music journey, I have a background in mechanical engineering, specializing in solid mechanics and design. I have been involved in research projects and have contributed to inventions and academic papers.

This combination of engineering and music allows me to think differently and creatively. I am particularly interested in designing new musical instruments and exploring innovative ways to shape sound.

My goal is to build a unique artistic identity and develop a professional career in the music industry.

Guitar PerformanceSongwriting Music ProductionAbleton Live Mechanical EngineeringInstrument Design

My Instruments & Creative Practice

By combining live performance with digital production, I develop musical ideas that translate into both composition and performance.

// 03 — Creative Vision

Creative Vision

This vision board represents the way I experience and shape music — as a continuous flow of instinct, awareness, and transformation.

Sound evolves from abstract impulses into structured digital forms, then expands beyond boundaries into something atmospheric and immersive. For me, music exists between control and chaos — a balance of randomness, intention, and design.

Time dissolves in the process of creation and performance, allowing full immersion in the present moment. Every element is interconnected, forming a chain of meaning that drives the work forward.

Ultimately, this reflects a state in which I feel grounded — not simply creating music, but anchoring myself within it.

© 2026 subXonic — All rights reserved
// 04 — Literacies

Literacies

In this section, I reflect on the key literacies I am developing throughout my studies and creative practice.

Digital Literacy

I have basic experience working with music software such as Ableton Live, and I am currently learning how to use it more effectively.

Creative Literacy

Creativity is one of my strongest areas. I enjoy creating new musical ideas and experimenting with different sounds and structures.

Critical Literacy

I am learning how to analyse music more effectively, including understanding song structure, harmony, and stylistic elements.

Collaborative Literacy

I am developing my communication and teamwork skills through working with others in class and sharing ideas.

// 05 — AIM Credential

AIM Credential

This section presents my Academic Integrity Module (AIM) credential from the University of Canberra, confirming my completion of academic integrity training focused on ethical scholarship, proper referencing, and plagiarism prevention.

© 2026 subXonic — All rights reserved
// 06 — Motivation

Motivation

My motivation for studying music comes from a long-standing personal interest in creating and performing music. Over time, what started as a hobby has developed into a serious goal that I want to pursue professionally.

I am particularly interested in music production, songwriting, and performance, and I want to improve both my technical and creative skills. Through this course, I aim to gain a deeper understanding of music theory, production techniques, and the overall creative process.

I am motivated to challenge myself, learn new skills, and grow as an artist. This program gives me the opportunity to turn my passion into a structured and professional path.

© 2026 subXonic — All rights reserved
// 07 — Career Plan

Career Plan

My career goal is to become a professional music producer and artist, focusing on songwriting, music production, and performance. I want to build a unique artistic identity and create original music that connects with listeners.

Currently, I am still developing my technical skills in music production, recording, and mixing. I am learning how to use software such as Ableton Live more effectively and improving my understanding of music theory.

I am also planning to continue my academic journey after completing my bachelor's degree. After that, I intend to pursue postgraduate study, including a Master's degree and potentially progressing towards a PhD.

5-Year Plan

Years 1–2
Foundation & Development
Continue developing skills in music production, performance, and songwriting while progressing through my degree.
Year 2–2.5
Bachelor's Completion
Complete my bachelor's degree and begin preparing for postgraduate study.
Years 3–4
Postgraduate & Release
Start postgraduate study while releasing original music and collaborating with other artists.
Year 5
Professional Artist
Actively working as a music producer and artist with a growing portfolio.
